cn.hero_eyebrow: ORIGIN EVA — 大宗贸易服务平台
cn.hero_lead: 您在中亚及俄罗斯地区值得信赖的贸易伙伴，专注大宗商品采购与中国产品出口服务。
cn.about_text: 起源（Origin EVA）是一家专注于国际贸易的服务公司，致力于为中国与中亚及俄罗斯地区的企业搭建高效、可靠的贸易桥梁。我们拥有丰富的行业经验和广泛的商业网络，为客户提供专业的大宗商品采购服务以及中国各类产品的出口销售服务。我们的团队由资深贸易专家组成，深入了解中亚及俄罗斯市场的特点与需求，能够为客户提供量身定制的贸易解决方案，帮助客户在复杂的国际贸易环境中把握机遇、实现增长。
cn.about_feature1: 中亚及俄罗斯市场专家
cn.about_feature1_desc: 深耕中亚及俄罗斯市场多年，熟悉当地政策法规与商业环境
cn.about_feature2_desc: 为客户提供优质的大宗商品采购渠道与供应链解决方案
cn.about_feature3_desc: 助力中国企业拓展中亚及俄罗斯市场，提供全方位销售服务
cn.about_feature4_desc: 以诚信为本，建立长期稳定的商业合作关系
cn.services_desc: 从采购到销售，从咨询到合作，我们提供一站式国际贸易服务
cn.svc_procurement_desc: 为客户提供优质的大宗商品采购服务，包括原材料、能源、农产品等各类商品。
cn.svc_sales_desc: 帮助中国企业将优质产品销往中亚及俄罗斯市场，提供全方位销售支持。
cn.svc_consulting_desc: 提供专业的国际贸易咨询服务，帮助客户了解市场动态与政策法规。
cn.svc_partnership_desc: 与优质企业建立长期战略合作关系，共同开拓国际市场。
cn.cases_desc: 每一个项目都是我们专业能力的体现，见证了我们与合作伙伴的共同成长
cn.case_energy_desc: 成功协助中国企业完成价值数亿元的能源产品采购项目
cn.case_agri_desc: 帮助中国农产品企业开拓俄罗斯市场，年销售额突破千万
cn.case_infra_desc: 参与中亚地区多个基础设施建设项目，提供物资供应服务
cn.case_industry_desc: 为制造业客户采购俄罗斯高品质工业原材料
cn.case_logistics_desc: 建立高效的中亚物流通道，降低运输成本30%
cn.case_brand_desc: 协助多个中国品牌成功进入中亚及俄罗斯市场
cn.insights_desc: 专业团队为您解读最新贸易形势，助力企业把握市场脉搏
cn.insight_1_title: 2024年中亚贸易形势分析与展望
cn.insight_1_desc: 深入分析中亚地区贸易政策变化，为企业出海提供战略参考
cn.insight_2_title: 俄罗斯市场新机遇解读
cn.insight_2_desc: 视频解读：俄罗斯市场最新动态与投资机会
cn.insight_3_title: 中亚农产品贸易新趋势
cn.insight_3_desc: 探讨中亚农产品贸易的最新发展趋势与商机
cn.testimonials_desc: 听听我们的合作伙伴如何评价与起源的合作体验
cn.testimonial_1_text: 起源团队的专业能力令人印象深刻。他们不仅帮助我们找到了优质的中国供应商，还在整个采购过程中提供了全方位的支持。合作非常愉快！
cn.testimonial_2_text: 通过起源的服务，我们成功将产品打入了俄罗斯市场。他们对当地市场的深入了解和丰富的商业资源，为我们的海外拓展提供了巨大帮助。
cn.testimonial_3_text: 与起源的合作让我们接触到了更多优质的中国制造商。他们的服务高效、专业，是值得信赖的贸易伙伴。
cn.section_cta_subtitle: 准备好拓展您的业务了吗？
cn.section_cta_desc: 无论您是希望进入中亚及俄罗斯市场，还是寻找优质的中国供应商，起源都将是您最可靠的合作伙伴。

en.hero_lead: Your trusted trade partner in Central Asia and Russia, specializing in bulk commodity procurement and Chinese product export services.
en.about_text: Origin EVA is an international trade service company dedicated to building efficient and reliable trade bridges between China and Central Asia & Russia. With extensive industry experience and a wide business network, we provide professional bulk commodity procurement services and Chinese product export services.
en.about_feature1_desc: Deep understanding of local policies and business environments
en.about_feature2_desc: Quality commodity sourcing and supply chain solutions
en.about_feature3_desc: Helping Chinese companies expand into Central Asian markets
en.about_feature4_desc: Building long-term stable business relationships with integrity
en.services_desc: From procurement to sales, from consulting to partnership, we provide one-stop international trade services
en.svc_procurement_desc: Providing quality bulk commodity procurement services including raw materials, energy, and agricultural products.
en.svc_sales_desc: Helping Chinese companies sell quality products in Central Asia and Russia markets.
en.svc_consulting_desc: Providing professional international trade consulting services.
en.svc_partnership_desc: Building long-term strategic partnerships to jointly explore international markets.
en.cases_desc: Every project demonstrates our professional capabilities and the growth we share with our partners
en.case_energy_desc: Assisted Chinese enterprises in completing energy procurement projects worth hundreds of millions
en.case_agri_desc: Helped Chinese agricultural enterprises enter the Russian market with annual sales exceeding 10 million
en.case_infra_desc: Participated in multiple infrastructure projects in Central Asia, providing material supply services
en.case_industry_desc: Procuring high-quality Russian industrial raw materials for manufacturing clients
en.case_logistics_desc: Established efficient Central Asia logistics channels, reducing transportation costs by 30%
en.case_brand_desc: Assisted multiple Chinese brands in successfully entering Central Asia and Russia markets
en.insights_desc: Our professional team interprets the latest trade trends to help enterprises seize market opportunities
en.insight_1_desc: In-depth analysis of Central Asia trade policy changes, providing strategic references for overseas expansion
en.insight_2_title: New Opportunities in the Russian Market
en.insight_2_desc: Video analysis of the latest developments and investment opportunities in the Russian market
en.insight_3_title: New Trends in Central Asia Agricultural Trade
en.insight_3_desc: Exploring the latest development trends and business opportunities in Central Asia agricultural trade
en.testimonials_desc: Hear what our partners say about their experience working with Origin
en.testimonial_1_text: The Origin team's professionalism is impressive. They not only helped us find quality Chinese suppliers but also provided comprehensive support throughout the procurement process.
en.testimonial_2_text: Through Origin's services, we successfully entered the Russian market. Their deep understanding of the local market and rich business resources provided tremendous help for our overseas expansion.
en.testimonial_3_text: Our cooperation with Origin has allowed us to access more quality Chinese manufacturers. Their service is efficient and professional, a trustworthy trade partner.
en.section_cta_desc: Whether you want to enter the Central Asia and Russia markets or find quality Chinese suppliers, Origin will be your most reliable partner.

ru.hero_lead: Vash nadezhnyj torgovyj partner v Centralnoj Azii i Rossii, specializiruyushchijsya na zakupkah syrjevyh tovarov i eksportnyh uslugah.
ru.about_text: Origin EVA — eto kompaniya, specializiruyushchayasya na mezhdunarodnoj torgovle, stremyashchayasya sozdavat effektivnye i nadezhnye torgovye mosty mezhdu Kitaem i Centralnoj Aziej i Rossiej.
ru.about_feature1_desc: Glubokoe ponimanie mestnyh politik i delovoj sredy
ru.about_feature2_desc: Kachestvennoe snabzhenie i resheniya dlya cepej postavok
ru.about_feature3_desc: Pomoshch kitajskim kompaniyam v vyhode na rynki Centralnoj Azii
ru.about_feature4_desc: Postroenie dolgosrochnyh delovyh otnoshenij na osnove doveriya
ru.services_desc: Ot zakupok do prodazh, ot konsaltinga do partnerstva — my predostavlyaem kompleksnye uslugi mezhdunarodnoj torgovli
ru.svc_procurement_desc: Predostavlenie kachestvennyh uslug po zakupke syrjevyh tovarov, vklyuchaya syre, energonositeli i selhozprodukciyu.
ru.svc_sales_desc: Pomoshch kitajskim kompaniyam v prodazhe kachestvennoj produkcii na rynkah Centralnoj Azii i Rossii.
ru.svc_consulting_desc: Predostavlenie professionalnyh konsultacionnyh uslug v oblasti mezhdunarodnoj torgovli.
ru.svc_partnership_desc: Postroenie dolgosrochnyh strategicheskih partnerstv dlya sovmestnogo osvoeniya mezhdunarodnyh rynkov.
ru.cases_desc: Kazhdyj proekt demonstriruet nash professionalizm i rost vmeste s partnerami
ru.case_energy_desc: Pomoshch kitajskim kompaniyam v zakupkah energeticheskih tovarov na sotni millionov yuan
ru.case_agri_desc: Pomoshch kitajskim agropredpriyatiyam v vyhode na rossijskij rynok
ru.case_infra_desc: Uchastie v infrastrukturnyh proektah v Centralnoj Azii
ru.case_logistics_desc: Sozdanie effektivnyh logisticheskih kanalov, snizhenie zatrat na 30%
ru.case_brand_desc: Pomoshch kitajskim brendam v uspeshnom vyhode na rynki CA i Rossii
ru.insights_desc: Nasha professionalnaya komanda interpretiruet poslednie torgovye trendy
ru.insight_1_desc: Uglublennyj analiz izmenenij torgovoj politiki Centralnoj Azii
ru.insight_2_desc: Videoanaliz poslednih tendencij i investicionnyh vozmozhnostej
ru.insight_3_desc: Issledovanie novyh tendencij i vozmozhnostej v selhoztorgovle CA
ru.testimonials_desc: Uznaite, chto govoryat nashi partnery o sotrudnichestve s Origin
ru.testimonial_1_text: Professionalizm komandy Origin vpechatlyaet. Oni ne tolko pomogli najti kachestvennyh kitajskih postavshchikov, no i obespechili vsestoronnuyu podderzhku.
ru.testimonial_2_text: Blagodarya uslugam Origin my uspeshno vyshli na rossijskij rynok. Ih glubokoe ponimanie mestnogo rynka okazalo ogromnuyu pomoshch.
ru.testimonial_3_text: Sotrudnichestvo s Origin pozvolilo nam poluchit dostup k kachestvennym kitajskim proizvoditelyam. Nadezhnyj torgovyj partner.
ru.section_cta_desc: Nezavisimo ot togo, hoteli li vy vyjti na rynki Centralnoj Azii i Rossii ili najti kachestvennyh kitajskih postavshchikov, Origin budet vashim samym nadezhnym partnerom.
